title: NatalRequest
description: Request contract for POST /calculate/bazi/natal. Computes the natal per-pillar analysis (hidden stems, Ten Gods relative to the day master, month command) for a single birth chart. Mirrors the /calculate/bazi request essentials (minus the trace toggle); date/tz/lat/lon are required — this new surface has no silent location default. TODO: replace `$id` host before production release.

date.description: Local civil date-time of birth in ISO 8601 form (e.g. 1990-06-15T14:30:00). Interpreted in the IANA timezone given by `tz`.

tz.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g. Europe/Berlin). Pattern catches simple typos; full IANA validity is enforced by the calculation backend.

standard.description: Time standard for interpreting the local datetime.

boundary.description: Day-boundary convention for the day pillar (same vocabulary as /calculate/bazi).

birth_time_known.description: False if birth time is uncertain — flags the hour pillar as provisional and emits the BIRTH_TIME_UNKNOWN warning.
